title: Delete column query
excerpt: Via a webhook POST request i aim to delete speicifc board column. Somehow i get an internal server error, do you have any idea why so?

posts.author: annafeller97 (Anna Feller)
posts.cookedHtml: Via a webhook POST request i aim to delete speicifc board column. Somehow i get an internal server error, do you have any idea why so?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@annafeller97 ,
this may be due to some reasons such as

  1. Ensure that the URL you are using to send the webhook POST request is correct and points to the right Monday API endpoint for column deletion.

  2. Make sure you have provided the necessary authentication credentials

  3. Verify that the API key or token being used has sufficient permissions to delete columns on the specified board.

  4. Check if you are exceeding the rate limits set by Monday API. Frequent or rapid requests may lead to internal server errors.

Hope its helpful to you.
